query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('SB-001-B001', 1, 1, 'Custom gray fabric with reinforced stitching, custom packaging with company logo', 270.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-001-B002', 1, 3, 'Light gray fabric upgrade, additional cushion padding, white glove delivery', 295.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-001-B003', 1, 5, 'Standard version with expedited production timeline', 280.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-001-B004', 1, 8, 'Bulk order discount applied, standard packaging', 255.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-B001', 2, 2, 'Navy blue velvet with gold leg finish upgrade', 440.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-B002', 2, 4, 'Custom dimensions: 220cm length instead of 210cm', 455.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-B003', 2, 7, 'Standard version, premium packaging', 425.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-B004', 2, 10, 'Bulk order 50+ units, volume discount', 385.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-002-B005', 2, 12, 'Custom fabric color: midnight blue', 435.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-003-B001', 3, 1, 'Beige linen with stain-resistant coating', 330.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-003-B002', 3, 6, 'Custom armrest height adjustment', 340.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-003-B003', 3, 9, 'Standard version, express shipping', 315.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-003-B004', 3, 11, 'Bulk order discount, 30+ units', 285.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-B001', 4, 2, 'Charcoal fabric with extra storage compartments', 590.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-B002', 4, 5, 'Custom chaise lounge orientation (left instead of right)', 580.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-B003', 4, 8, 'Standard version with premium chrome legs', 565.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-B004', 4, 13, 'Bulk order 20+ units, volume pricing', 505.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-004-B005', 4, 15, 'Custom fabric upgrade: charcoal velvet', 610.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-005-B001', 5, 3, 'Teal blue fabric with darker shade variation', 255.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-005-B002', 5, 7, 'Standard version, custom packaging', 245.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW()),
('SB-005-B003', 5, 14, 'Bulk order 40+ units, discounted rate', 215.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW());
